trades.reasoning: Score 90 with RSI at 67 — the bullish momentum zone without being overbought — plus MACD bullish crossover and price above SMA-20; best risk-adjusted entry among available candidates given remaining cash.

decisions.briefing: Markets are essentially flat today — S&P unchanged, NASDAQ up barely 0.3% — which is a low-conviction environment. With $1,406 cash and five open slots, I'm deploying into TSLA as the highest-quality entry: score 90, RSI not yet overbought at 67, and clean MACD confirmation. Most other top candidates carry RSI readings above 75–90, signaling elevated mean-reversion risk. Existing positions — PTON, EAT, OLED, AMZN, QQQ — are all held as none have triggered stop-loss or profit targets.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities traded in a narrow range on May 7 as investors weighed mixed signals ahead of upcoming central bank commentary and corporate earnings. The NASDAQ edged marginally higher driven by continued strength in technology and AI-adjacent names, while the broader S&P 500 digested recent gains with little directional conviction. Risk appetite remained measured, with traders reluctant to extend positions aggressively in the absence of a clear macro catalyst.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股5月7日窄幅整理，投資者在等待央行政策信號及企業財報期間態度審慎。納斯達克受科技及人工智能相關股帶動，小幅收高；標普500則在消化近期升幅後維持盤整，缺乏明確方向。市場風險偏好保持溫和，投資者在無重大宏觀催化劑下，不願積極追高建倉。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: When a stock's RSI climbs above 70, it signals that the price has risen sharply in a short period and buyers may be exhausted — making a pullback more likely. Today's screener shows most top candidates (AAON, DDOG, FTNT, QCOM, etc.) with RSIs between 74 and 91, which is why TSLA at RSI 67 was preferred: strong momentum without the overextension that raises reversal risk.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 當股票的相對強弱指數（RSI）升破70，意味著股價在短期內漲幅過大、買盤動能可能趨於飽和，回調風險隨之上升。今日篩選名單中大多數強勢股（如AAON、DDOG、FTNT、QCOM等）RSI均介於74至91之間，這正是優先選擇RSI僅67的TSLA的原因——動能強勁，但尚未進入過熱區間，回撤風險相對較低。
